lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Oh, er, hello. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: There's not much farming land around here. Only that little patch outside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me any advice on farming here in the desert?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Like I said, I only know about cactuses...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just tell me about cactuses, then.

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: First you have to weed the patch using a rake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me any other advice?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Not really. I've not done much farming recently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, can you at least sell me any gardening tools or seeds?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Sorry. They haven't been delivered yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what do you do here?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: I'm going to set up a shop selling farming implements. That patch out there may be small, but it's all we've got.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me any advice on farming here in the desert?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Like I said, I only know about cactuses...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just tell me about cactuses, then.

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: First you have to weed the patch using a rake.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me any other advice?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Not really. I've not done much farming recently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, can you at least sell me any gardening tools or seeds?

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Sorry. They haven't been delivered yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you work for Ali Morrisane...

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Yes, he bought these tents and had them put up for us. He says he'll also get our goods in so we can start selling them soon.

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: I only know how to farm cactuses, so this spot is perfect.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I should talk to him...

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Of course. He's always happy to talk to possible business partners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you've been threatening the other shopkeepers.

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Now why would you think that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One of the shopkeepers told they were threatened by a man with a rake...

lines.speaker: Ali the Farmer
lines.text: Those people just don't want us to succeed. Don't listen to them!
